description: Payment failure analysis and dunning decision

customer_email.description: Customer email address (from data.object.customer_email or receipt_email) - required for recovery email delivery

customer_name.description: Customer name if available from the Stripe event

event_type.description: Stripe event type that triggered this analysis

amount_cents.description: Failed payment amount in smallest currency unit (e.g. cents)

failure_reason.description: Why the payment failed (card_declined, insufficient_funds, etc.)

attempt_number.description: Which payment attempt this is (from data.object.attempt_count)

dunning_action.description: Decided dunning stage based on attempt_number and history
